MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER YUSUF IBRAHIM Notice of Hearing on Petition For Release of Mechanic's Lien. Appearances: John Grele, Esq. Verification presented to the Court re: the removal of the lien. Ruling: Off Calendar, Verification presented. Order dismissing the Petition signed in Open Court.
